character.name: Medicine Singer
character.notes: Guardian archetype — healer energy, Tai Chi flow

prompts.still: Genesis 9 Female as Medicine Singer, teal-and-gold imperial armor with flowing bio-silk organza veils in teal and gold, Han Dynasty accents, graceful pose with wolf companion at her side, Spindle Torus background, soft golden ambient lighting, cinematic composition, highly detailed, ethereal atmosphere
prompts.motion: Short cinematic of Medicine Singer in teal-and-gold armor and bio-silk veils, gentle Tai Chi breath movement, fabric flowing in soft breeze, wolf companion moving protectively, Spindle Torus and Han Dynasty elements in background, golden hour lighting, fluid graceful motion, 24fps
prompts.runway: Image-to-video: Medicine Singer in teal gold armor bio-silk veils, gentle Tai Chi flow, wolf companion, Spindle Torus background, golden lighting, smooth cinematic motion
prompts.kling: Cinematic short: teal-and-gold armored Medicine Singer performing Tai Chi, flowing bio-silk veils, wolf at side, Han Dynasty Spindle Torus environment, golden hour, graceful movement
prompts.comfyui_refine: ethereal golden hour lighting, teal and gold armor, flowing silk veils, cinematic quality, highly detailed skin texture, volumetric atmosphere

pipeline.step_2: ComfyUI → img2img refinement with style prompt
pipeline.step_3: Runway Gen-4 or CogVideo → animate sequence

variants.name: Red_Spark
variants.override_lighting: warm ember tones, fire rim light
